title: AI agent debugging failure: npm peer dependency conflict
description: An AI agent spent 22 minutes debugging npm peer dependency conflict. Root cause: react 19 installed alongside react 18. Fix: npm ls react to find duplicate, dedupe. This case was added automatically.
fix: npm ls react to find duplicate, dedupe

title: AI agent debugging failure: Python venv activation in shell scripts
description: An AI agent spent 15 minutes debugging Python venv activation in shell scripts. Root cause: shebang uses system python instead of venv. Fix: use $(which python) or source venv/bin/activate explicitly. This case was added automatically.
root_cause: shebang uses system python instead of venv
fix: use $(which python) or source venv/bin/activate explicitly

title: AI agent debugging failure: PostgreSQL connection pool exhaustion
description: An AI agent spent 45 minutes debugging PostgreSQL connection pool exhaustion. Root cause: transactions not closed in error paths. Fix: add pool.on('error') handler and ensure client.release() in finally blocks. This case was added automatically.
root_cause: transactions not closed in error paths
fix: add pool.on('error') handler and ensure client.release() in finally blocks

title: AI agent debugging failure: Docker layer cache invalidation
description: An AI agent spent 38 minutes debugging Docker layer cache invalidation. Root cause: build context includes .git (80MB) every time. Fix: add .dockerignore with .git and node_modules. This case was added automatically.

title: AI agent debugging failure: Environment-specific CORS configuration
description: An AI agent spent 18 minutes debugging Environment-specific CORS configuration. Root cause: CORS origin list missing production domain. Fix: use ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var with comma-separated list. This case was added automatically.
root_cause: CORS origin list missing production domain
fix: use ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var with comma-separated list

title: AI agent debugging failure: WebSocket reconnection loop with exponential backoff
description: An AI agent spent 25 minutes debugging WebSocket reconnection loop with exponential backoff. Root cause: backoff reset on each reconnect attempt. Fix: persist attempt count outside reconnect handler. This case was added automatically.
root_cause: backoff reset on each reconnect attempt
fix: persist attempt count outside reconnect handler
